texto: Up until that moment, I'd been at the earliest stage of love, when you feel it will turn you into the person you want to be. Now, his gentle voice and sage advice took me to a later stage: I felt I needed to pretend to be a better person than I was so he'd keep loving me. This was hard because it made me hate him.

texto: You will say good-bye for all the right reasons. You're tired of living in wait for his apocalypse. You have to tighten your grip -- which means letting go of him.
